testing_centers.notes: Pearson VUE CBT test centers or remote proctored online. CSSWB is online only through ASQ website.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match ASQ registration exactly.
exam_rules: Open-book: printed and bound reference materials allowed. No electronic reference aids (no tablets, phones, laptops, e-readers). No programmable calculators. Basic scientific calculators permitted. Available in English and Spanish for some exams.
renewal_options: 3-year recertification cycle. 18 Recertification Units (RUs) required per 3-year period. RUs can be earned through education, experience, and professional activities. Alternatively, recertify by retaking and passing the exam.

retake_policy.notes: 8-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake. No limit on total number of attempts.

official_study_resources.title: ASQ Certification Body of Knowledge
official_study_resources.notes: Free Body of Knowledge (BoK) documents and exam preparation resources for each certification

aliases: certified six sigma white belt csswb
